title: Mininet Network Simulation Series
summary: A chain of five modules building a comprehensive Python network simulation library. Starting from Mininet's core SDN emulation framework (topology management, bandwidth simulation, ping/iperf), extending with Mininet-WiFi's wireless capabilities (propagation models, station/AP association, mobility), Containernet's Docker container host support with Service Function Chain modeling, P4 programmable data plane simulation, and a reactive/proactive SDN controller with flow rule management.
instructionPreview: Implement a Python network simulation library (netsim) that models SDN network emulation. The project has five modules to implement in order: 1. Mininet core: Node/Host/Switch classes, Link/TCLink, topology builders, network engine with ping/iperf/RTT simulation 2. Mininet-WiFi: Wireless propagation models, Station/AccessPoint, mobility models, signal-dependent wireless links, auto-association 3. Containernet: Docker container hosts with resource limits, Service Function Chain modeling, resource fairness computation 4. P4 Switch: P4-programmable data plane with match-action tables, parser/deparser pipeline stages, per-flow counters, multicast groups, and pipeline latency modeling 5. SDN Controller: Reactive and proactive SDN controllers with flow rule management, Dijkstra path computation, timeout-based eviction, and link failure recovery Working directory: /workspace Each module has a run.sh that outputs experiment results as KEY: VALUE lines. Tests are in /tests/<module_name>/test_outputs.py and verify experiment values.
instruction:
Implement a Python network simulation library (netsim) that models SDN network emulation.
The project has five modules to implement in order:
1. Mininet core: Node/Host/Switch classes, Link/TCLink, topology builders, network engine
   with ping/iperf/RTT simulation
2. Mininet-WiFi: Wireless propagation models, Station/AccessPoint, mobility models,
   signal-dependent wireless links, auto-association
3. Containernet: Docker container hosts with resource limits, Service Function Chain
   modeling, resource fairness computation
4. P4 Switch: P4-programmable data plane with match-action tables, parser/deparser
   pipeline stages, per-flow counters, multicast groups, and pipeline latency modeling
5. SDN Controller: Reactive and proactive SDN controllers with flow rule management,
   Dijkstra path computation, timeout-based eviction, and link failure recovery
Working directory: /workspace
Each module has a run.sh that outputs experiment results as KEY: VALUE lines.
Tests are in /tests/<module_name>/test_outputs.py and verify experiment values.

moduleDag.description: A chain of five modules building a comprehensive Python network simulation library. Starting from Mininet's core SDN emulation framework (topology management, bandwidth simulation, ping/iperf), extending with Mininet-WiFi's wireless capabilities (propagation models, station/AP association, mobility), Containernet's Docker container host support with Service Function Chain modeling, P4 programmable data plane simulation, and a reactive/proactive SDN controller with flow rule management.

nodes.label: A Network in a Laptop: Rapid Prototyping for SDN
nodes.description: Core Mininet network emulation: Node/Host/Switch/Controller classes, Link/TCLink with bandwidth and delay, topology builders (Linear, Tree, SingleSwitch), and simulation engine with ping, iperf, and RTT computation.

nodes.label: Mininet-WiFi: Emulating Software-Defined Wireless Networks
nodes.description: Wireless network extensions: propagation models (Friis, log-distance), Station and AccessPoint classes with position/signal, RandomWaypoint mobility, wireless links with RSSI-dependent bandwidth, and auto-association.

nodes.label: Containernet 2.0: Hybrid Service Function Chains
nodes.description: Container-based host support: DockerHost with CPU/memory resource constraints, VNF and ServiceFunctionChain for SFC throughput/latency modeling, Containernet engine with resource fairness computation.

nodes.label: P4-Programmable Data Plane Simulation
nodes.description: P4 programmable switch pipeline: match-action tables with priority-based lookup, packet parser and deparser stages, per-flow counters, multicast groups, and P4Topology builder with pipeline latency modeling.

nodes.label: Reactive SDN Controller with Flow Rule Management
nodes.description: SDN controller framework: FlowRule and FlowTable abstractions with timeout eviction, Dijkstra-based path computation, reactive and proactive controller strategies, topology discovery, and link failure recovery.

edges.label: Mininet-WiFi extends Mininet with wireless network emulation
Containernet extends Mininet with Docker container hosts
P4 switch extends Mininet Switch and Topo classes
SDN controller discovers and manages Mininet networks
